validation_summary: NDTSC14140F110G resolves cleanly via exact partNumber match to id 155723 and opens https://www.fassride.com/details?id=155723. Prefix-alias samples like FASS-PFD-1001 and FASS-PF-3001 return fuzzy JSON hits, so the raw search URL is not sufficient by itself unless result scoring is applied.
notes: Prefer API-first search -> score JSON products by partNumber -> build details?id={id}. Popup anchor confirms the same id-based detail route.

validation_summary: search.html?q=67OP returns product links like /i-30519976?q=67OP and exact SKU text in the result block. The homepage Partslogic widget exists, but direct typing in headless did not emit a predictive request; the results page route is the stronger deterministic entry point.
notes: Treat /search.html?q={sku} as the primary resolver and click the best /i-... result. The homepage widget is useful for manual validation

validation_summary: Homepage search form posts search/category/__RequestVerificationToken to /api/ue/AddSiteVisitorSearchResults, then lands on GET /SearchResults. Autocomplete endpoint: /Api/Search/GetProdAutocomplete?value={sku}&cat=all. Sample TEK-9030 yielded 0 results.
notes: Known custom POST search flow. No clean GET search URL template recorded yet.
